templates.title: REST API Client Builder
templates.description: Class builder untuk REST API client dengan .get() .post() .put() .delete(). stdlib urllib.

templates.title: API Pagination Handler
templates.description: Auto-follow paginasi API: support offset dan cursor-based pagination.

templates.title: OAuth2 Client Credentials Flow
templates.description: Dapatkan token OAuth2 via client_credentials grant, simpan & auto-refresh.

templates.title: Token Bucket Rate Limiter
templates.description: Batasi request per detik/menit menggunakan algoritma token bucket.

templates.title: GraphQL Query Builder
templates.description: Bangun query/mutation GraphQL string dari dict Python. Tanpa library eksternal.

templates.title: Bearer Auth Decorator
templates.description: Decorator untuk auto-attach Authorization: Bearer header ke fungsi HTTP request.

templates.title: HTTP Response Cache
templates.description: Cache GET response dengan TTL. Thread-safe in-memory cache.

templates.title: HTTP Circuit Breaker
templates.description: Pattern circuit breaker: stop panggil API yang gagal berturut-turut. State machine CLOSED→OPEN→HALF_OPEN.
